messages:
{"parts":[{"content":"Challenges to HLTx  – Internal environment\
•Thoracic organ TX is a speciality demands undiluted focus

•Heart teams exist in principle not practise

•Pulmonologists  lack exposure and training in transplant immunology – major impediment

•The broad array of instrumentation needed for an HLtx service is a major capital expenditure.

•Pulmonary rehabilitation as part of the respiratory rehabilitation  is ill equipped , understaffed and overlooked

•Transplant dietetics and nutrition are a crucial part of care and remain  unstructured.

•Immunology and transplant pathology  expertise in analysing  lung biopsies are growing in recent times.

•A post TX intensive care service is capital and resource intensive, involves a major investment requiring

•Adequate numbers in your program to sustain and be viable long term.

•","timestamp":"2026-02-09T00:16:39.539200Z","part_kind":"user-prompt"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
